Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JModality.JavaModalityKind

Packages that use JModality.JavaModalityKind
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.impl
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.infflow
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.po
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.

    static final JModality.JavaModalityKind
    JModality.JavaModalityKind.BOX
    The box operator of dynamic logic.
    static final JModality.JavaModalityKind
    JModality.JavaModalityKind.BOX_TRANSACTION
    A Java Card transaction version of the box modality.
    static final JModality.JavaModalityKind
    JModality.JavaModalityKind.DIA
    The diamond operator of dynamic logic.
    static final JModality.JavaModalityKind
    JModality.JavaModalityKind.DIA_TRANSACTION
    A Java Card transaction version of the diamond modality.
    static final JModality.JavaModalityKind
    JModality.JavaModalityKind.TOUT
    The throughout operator of dynamic logic.
    static final JModality.JavaModalityKind
    JModality.JavaModalityKind.TOUT_TRANSACTION

    ContractFactory.createInformationFlowContract(KeYJavaType forClass, IProgramMethod pm, KeYJavaType specifiedIn, JModality.JavaModalityKind modalityKind, JTerm requires, JTerm requiresFree, JTerm measuredBy, JTerm modifiable, boolean hasModifiable, ProgramVariableCollection progVars, JTerm accessible, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> infFlowSpecs, boolean toBeSaved)

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.util with parameters of type JModality.JavaModalityKind
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<LocationVariable>
    MiscTools.applicableHeapContexts(JModality.JavaModalityKind modalityKind, Services services)
    Returns the applicable heap contexts out of the currently available set of three contexts: The normal heap, the saved heap (transaction), and the permission heap.
    static boolean
    MiscTools.isTransaction(JModality.JavaModalityKind modalityKind)
    Checks whether the given JModality.JavaModalityKind is a transaction modality.
